story.asA: a developer building Chiron's workflow initialization system
story.iWant: to implement project creation flow with workflow initializer selection and the first 2 steps of workflow-init-new (field type detection and directory selection)
story.soThat: users can start creating a new project, select their setup approach, and provide the foundational information (project location) before the description and path selection workflows in Story 1.6

task.title: Database Schema Updates
task.subtask: Update packages/db/src/schema/core.ts with project_status enum and projects table updates
Update packages/db/src/schema/workflows.ts with ExecuteActionStepConfig and AskUserStepConfig types

task.title: ExecuteActionStepHandler Implementation
task.subtask: Register handler in step type registry

task.title: AskUserStepHandler Implementation
task.subtask: Register handler in step type registry

task.title: AskUserStep UI Component
task.subtask: Create ask-user-step.tsx with dynamic response type rendering

task.title: Project Creation Flow
task.subtask: Update home page with Create New Project button

task.title: Variable Resolution Integration
task.subtask: Add system variables to execution context

category.name: Project Creation Flow
category.criterion: Home page displays Create New Project button
Clicking button calls projects.create tRPC mutation
Backend creates project record with name: Untitled Project, status: initializing, path: null, initializerWorkflowId: null, userId: current_user_id
User redirected to /projects/{projectId}/select-initializer
Project record persists even if user abandons flow
Selector page queries workflows table for initializer_type = new-project
Page displays workflow-init-new-guided as card using shadcn RadioGroup13 component
Card shows: Icon (Workflow icon), Title: Guided Setup, Description: Conversational setup for new projects (15-20 min)
Card is auto-selected (only one option in Story 1.5)
Continue button enabled when initializer selected
Clicking Continue calls projects.setInitializer mutation
Backend updates project.initializerWorkflowId and creates workflow_executions record
projects.setInitializer mutation creates workflow execution with: projectId, workflowId, status: idle, variables: {}
User redirected to /projects/{projectId}/initialize
If project already has status: active, redirect to project dashboard instead
If workflow execution already exists, resume from current step

category.name: Step 1: Execute-Action (Field Type Detection)
category.criterion: ExecuteActionStepHandler supports actions[].type: set-variable with config.variable and config.value
Step 1 automatically executes without user input (no requiresUserInput)
Step 1 sets detected_field_type = greenfield in workflow_executions.variables
ExecuteActionStep UI component shows: Loading state (Spinner + Executing...), Success state (Checkmark + Completed, 500ms delay), Auto-advances to Step 2
Step 1 config seeded to database with correct JSONB structure
Step 1 completion tracked in workflow_executions.executedSteps[1]

category.name: Step 2: Ask-User (Directory Selection)
category.criterion: AskUserStepHandler supports responseType: path with pathConfig
Path validation checks: Parent directory exists, No directory traversal (..), Path is absolute, User has write permissions to parent
AskUserStep UI component renders: Message, Question, Path input with native file dialog button OR text input, Validation errors below input, Continue button (disabled when invalid or loading)
Native file dialog (Tauri file picker) opens when user clicks browse button
User can manually type path or use file browser
Validation errors display clearly with specific messages
User selection stored in workflow_executions.variables.project_path
Step 2 config seeded to database with correct JSONB structure

category.name: WorkflowStepper Integration
category.criterion: Initialize page uses WorkflowStepperWizard component from Story 1.4
Stepper displays Step 1 of 10 when on Step 1
Stepper displays Step 2 of 10 when on Step 2
Progress bar shows: 10% at Step 1, 20% at Step 2
Current step goal displayed for each step
WizardStepContainer component wraps step content
Back button hidden (workflow-init is forward-only)
Progress bar updates smoothly when advancing from Step 1 to Step 2

category.name: Step Handler Registry
category.criterion: ExecuteActionStepHandler registered in step type registry for step_type: execute-action
AskUserStepHandler registered in step type registry for step_type: ask-user
Step handlers implement StepHandler interface from Story 1.4
Handlers throw clear errors for invalid config

category.name: Workflow State Management
category.criterion: Can start workflow-init-new from initializer selector
Step 1 auto-executes and advances to Step 2 immediately
Completing Step 2 stores path in variables and pauses workflow
Can reload page at Step 2 and resume from same state
Can reload page at Step 1 and it auto-executes again (idempotent)
Workflow execution status updates correctly (idle → active → paused)

category.name: Variable Resolution Integration
category.criterion: System variables available in step context: {{project_id}}, {{execution_id}}, {{current_user_id}}
Step outputs accessible as variables in subsequent steps
Missing variable throws clear error

category.name: Error Handling
category.criterion: Invalid path shows specific error message
Network error during step submission shows retry button
Step config validation errors logged with step number and workflow ID
Retry button re-executes failed step
Error state doesn't auto-advance

category.name: Database Schema
category.criterion: project_status enum exists with values: initializing, active, archived, failed
projects table has: status field, initializerWorkflowId field, path field (nullable)
ExecuteActionStepConfig TypeScript type defined
AskUserStepConfig TypeScript type defined
SetVariableAction type defined
Drizzle migration generated and tested

category.name: Testing
category.criterion: Unit tests for ExecuteActionStepHandler cover all scenarios
Unit tests for AskUserStepHandler cover all validation scenarios
Integration test: Complete project creation flow end-to-end
Component tests for ExecuteActionStep cover all states
Component tests for AskUserStep cover all interactions
Component tests for initializer selector cover all scenarios
State persistence test verifies resume capability
Error recovery test validates retry mechanism
Multiple projects test ensures isolation
Resume abandoned initialization test validates recovery
Performance validation ensures speed requirements met

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Journey describes workflow-init conversation: project creation, field type detection, directory selection, and validation - directly supports Story 1.5 implementation of Steps 1-2

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR002: System shall execute workflows following BMAD workflow.xml engine rules. FR004: Resolve variables using 4-level precedence. FR005: Maintain workflow state and enable resume/restart

doc.title: Epic 1: Database Schema Implementation
doc.snippet: Defines Step 1 config (field type detection with execute-action), Step 2 config (path selector with ask-user), JSONB structure, and step type definitions for ExecuteActionStepConfig and AskUserStepConfig

doc.title: Story 1.4: Workflow Execution Engine Core
doc.snippet: Provides StepHandler interface, step registry pattern, variable resolver, WorkflowStepperWizard component, WizardStepContainer component - all reusable for Story 1.5 implementation

doc.title: Database Schema Architecture
doc.snippet: Defines how step configs are stored as JSONB, validation patterns, and type safety requirements for workflow step configurations

artifact.reason: Core interface that ExecuteActionStepHandler and AskUserStepHandler must implement - defines executeStep method signature and StepResult structure
Registry where new step handlers (execute-action, ask-user) must be registered - provides getHandler, register, and has methods
Used by step handlers to resolve {{variable}} references in step configs using 4-level precedence (system → execution → step outputs → defaults)
Table definition showing initializerType field (new-project/existing-project) for workflow-init-new identification
Table definition with config JSONB field that stores ExecuteActionStepConfig and AskUserStepConfig structures
Table definition with variables and executedSteps JSONB fields for runtime state tracking during workflow execution
Table definition needing updates: add status enum (initializing/active/archived/failed), initializerWorkflowId field, make path nullable
UI component from Story 1.4 showing Step X of N progress - reusable for workflow-init Steps 1-2 visualization

node.usage: tRPC mutations and queries for project creation and workflow initializer selection
Frontend tRPC client for calling backend mutations
Input validation for tRPC procedures and step config validation
Variable resolution in step configs using {{variable}} syntax
Deep merging execution variables when combining step outputs
Client-side routing for initializer selector and initialize pages
Query management for workflow state and project data
Tauri native file dialog for directory selection
Icons for UI components (Workflow icon, checkmarks, spinners)
Smooth animations for step transitions and progress bar updates
Component variant styling for shadcn/ui components

architectural.constraint: Project record created IMMEDIATELY on Create New Project click (not at workflow end) - enables future sub-workflow invocation and better error recovery
Step handlers MUST be generic and reusable for any workflow using that step type - NO workflow-init-specific logic hardcoded
All UI and validation logic driven by JSONB step config - NO hardcoded behavior in handlers
Variable resolution uses 4-level precedence (system → execution → step outputs → defaults) - MUST follow BMAD workflow.xml rules exactly
Auto-advance for backend-only steps (execute-action) - user interaction required only for ask-user steps
Path validation MUST prevent directory traversal (..) and ensure write permissions - security first
One-way link: projects.initializerWorkflowId references workflow definition (not execution instance)
Forward-only navigation in workflow-init - NO back button support in Story 1.5

testing.constraint: Unit tests required for each step handler in isolation with mocked context
Integration tests required for full Steps 1-2 flow with real database
Component tests required for UI with mocked tRPC queries
Manual testing required for Tauri native file dialog (platform-specific behavior)

database.constraint: workflow_steps.config JSONB MUST match TypeScript ExecuteActionStepConfig and AskUserStepConfig types exactly
Variable names MUST match Epic 1 specification: detected_field_type, project_path
Drizzle migration MUST be generated and tested before implementation

interface.name: StepHandler.executeStep
interface.signature: executeStep(step: WorkflowStep, context: ExecutionContext, userInput?: unknown): Promise<StepResult>
interface.usage: ExecuteActionStepHandler and AskUserStepHandler MUST implement this interface

interface.name: StepResult
interface.signature: { output: Record<string, unknown>; nextStepNumber: number | null; requiresUserInput: boolean; }
interface.usage: Return type for all step handler executeStep methods

interface.name: projects.create tRPC mutation
interface.usage: Creates project record with status: initializing, returns project ID for redirection

interface.name: workflows.getInitializers tRPC query
interface.usage: Queries workflows table for initializer_type = new-project to display in selector

interface.name: projects.setInitializer tRPC mutation
interface.signature: setInitializer: protectedProcedure.input(z.object({ projectId: string, initializerWorkflowId: string })).mutation()
interface.usage: Updates project.initializerWorkflowId and creates workflow_executions record

interface.name: Tauri dialog.open
interface.signature: open({ directory: boolean, multiple: boolean, defaultPath?: string }): Promise<string | null>
interface.usage: Opens native file dialog for directory selection in Step 2 path selector

tests.standards: Chiron uses Bun test framework for all backend tests and Vitest + React Testing Library for frontend component tests. Test files are co-located with source files using .test.ts/.test.tsx extension. Integration tests use real PostgreSQL test database (port 5434). Database is reset before each test suite using beforeAll hook. Mocks are created for external dependencies (Tauri APIs, tRPC queries). Test coverage required for all step handlers, tRPC procedures, and UI components. Performance tests validate execution time constraints (50ms for auto-execute, 100ms for validation, 200ms for submissions).

test.scenarios: - Set-variable with literal value (e.g., detected_field_type = greenfield) - Set-variable with variable reference (e.g., value: {{project_path}}/src) - Sequential execution mode (multiple actions, cumulative context) - Nested variable paths (e.g., metadata.complexity) - Error handling for unknown action type - Idempotent execution (same step can be run multiple times)

- Path validation: valid absolute path with existing parent directory - Path validation: invalid parent directory (doesn't exist) - Path validation: relative path (rejected) - Path validation: directory traversal with .. (blocked) - Path validation: no write permissions to parent (error) - Validation error messages are clear and actionable - mustExist flag respected in pathConfig

test.description: Integration test: Complete project creation flow end-to-end
test.scenarios: - Create project via tRPC mutation - Select initializer via setInitializer mutation - Execute Step 1 (field type detection) - auto-executes - Complete Step 2 (path selection) - user provides path - Verify database state after each stage: * Project record has status: initializing * Workflow execution exists with correct workflowId * executedSteps tracks Step 1 and Step 2 completion * variables contains detected_field_type and project_path

test.description: Component tests for ExecuteActionStep and AskUserStep
test.scenarios:
ExecuteActionStep: - Shows loading state (spinner + Executing... text) - Shows success state (checkmark + Completed) - Auto-advances to next step after 500ms delay - Displays error message if action fails - Retry button triggers re-execution
AskUserStep: - Path selector renders correctly with input and browse button - Native file dialog opens on button click (mocked) - Manual path input works - Validation errors display below input with specific messages - Submit button disabled when invalid or loading - Loading state shows spinner on button during submission

test.description: Component tests for initializer selector page
test.scenarios: - Displays workflow cards correctly using RadioGroup13 - Card shows icon, title, description - Card auto-selected when only one option available - Continue button enabled when selection made - Navigates to initialize page on continue click - Loading state during setInitializer mutation

test.description: State persistence test: Resume workflow after page reload
test.scenarios: - Start workflow, complete Step 1, reload page - Verify Step 1 auto-executes again (idempotent set-variable) - Complete Step 2, reload page - Verify Step 2 still shows user's previously selected path - Verify can continue from Step 2 without re-entering data

test.description: Error recovery test: Validation and network errors
test.scenarios: - Submit invalid path → see specific error message - Correct path → submission succeeds - Network error during submission → retry button appears - Retry button click → step re-executes - Successful retry → workflow advances to next step - Error state doesn't auto-advance workflow

test.description: Multiple projects test: Ensure execution isolation
test.scenarios: - Create project A, select initializer, complete Step 1 - Create project B, select initializer, complete Step 1 - Verify both projects have separate workflow_executions records - Verify variables don't leak between projects - Resume project A → workflow state is correct for A

- Create project, select initializer, complete Step 1 - Close browser without completing workflow - Reopen application, navigate to project - Verify project status = initializing - Verify can resume from Step 2 (Step 1 already completed) - Complete Step 2 → workflow continues normally

- Step 1 auto-execute completes within 50ms - Path validation completes within 100ms - Step submission completes within 200ms - Variable resolution completes within 50ms - Database workflow loading completes within 100ms
